title: UK overseas trade in goods statistics January 2025: import and export data
body: "The following tables contain EU and non-EU import and export data for January 2025 at chapter level.                UK overseas trade in goods statistics January 2025: imports    ODS, 24.2 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format                 UK overseas trade in goods statistics January 2025: exports    ODS, 25.2 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format    "
